artifacts.summary: Supplementary research identifying correct path for discreteness proofs via staged construction finiteness rather than DF frame condition extraction

key_findings: DF axiom under reflexive semantics is trivially valid - cannot derive discreteness from it
Discreteness follows from staged construction lacking DN (density axiom)
Correct path: prove finite intervals -> succFn equals min -> discreteness
LocallyFiniteOrder instance enables automatic IsSuccArchimedean from Mathlib
Estimated 2.5-3 hours for phases 4-5 via staged construction approach
recommendations: Add staged_build_finitely_between theorem showing finite points between any two MCSs
Derive discrete_timeline_lt_succFn from finite sets having minima (GLB = min)
Establish LocallyFiniteOrder instance from staged construction finiteness
